name: Water
description: The universal solvent — calm, adaptable, and essential for all known life. You go with the flow and make everything around you better.

name: Salt
description: A crystalline essential — you're basic but necessary. You add flavor to life and preserve what matters.

name: Sugar
description: Sweet, likable, and hard to resist. You make life sweeter and everyone wants a little more of you.

name: Baking Soda
description: Gentle but effective — you neutralize conflict and help things rise. The peacemaker in every reaction.

name: Vinegar
description: Sharp, tangy, and preservative. You cut through the noise and keep things from spoiling.

name: Bleach
description: Powerfully cleansing — you remove what's stained and start fresh. Intense but effective.

name: Ammonia
description: Pungent yet versatile. You're a strong cleaner that demands attention — you get the job done fast.

name: Hydrogen Peroxide
description: Effervescent and reactive — you bubble up when needed and disinfect negativity around you.

name: Rubbing Alcohol
description: Quick to evaporate, quick to act. You sanitize situations and leave no trace behind.

name: Acetone
description: Strong solvent — you dissolve barriers and strip away pretense. Powerful and unapologetic.

name: Aspirin
description: Soothing yet powerful — you ease pain and reduce inflammation. Everyone needs you when things get rough.

name: Caffeine
description: Energetic, focused, and alert. You wake people up and keep them going. The ultimate stimulant.

name: Nicotine
description: Addictively calm yet stimulating. You're complex — relaxing and focusing in equal measure.

name: Ethanol
description: Social, warm, and uninhibited. You lower defenses and bring people together — sometimes with regret.

name: Methanol
description: Simple, useful, but dangerous in the wrong hands. You're versatile but need careful handling.

name: Glucose
description: The body's fuel — you provide energy and drive. Steady, reliable, and always there when needed.

name: Sucrose
description: Sweet, likable, and hard to resist. You make life sweeter and everyone wants a little more of you.

name: Carbon Dioxide
description: A quiet exhale — you're everywhere but invisible. You sustain life but can overwhelm if unchecked.

name: Carbon Monoxide
description: Silent and sneaky — you bind tight and never let go. Intense loyalty with dangerous consequences.

name: Nitrous Oxide
description: Giggly, unpredictable, and fun. You make people laugh and see the lighter side of life.

name: Nitroglycerin
description: Explosive potential in a tiny package. You're volatile but incredibly effective when focused.

name: TNT
description: Explosive, intense, and dramatic. One spark and you change everything around you.

name: Dry Ice
description: Cold, dramatic, and transformative. You don't melt — you sublime. Mesmerizing to watch.

name: Formaldehyde
description: Preserving and controlling. You keep things exactly as they are — stubborn but effective.

name: Antifreeze
description: Protective and resilient. You lower freezing points and keep things running in the cold.

name: Teflon
description: Slippery, nonstick, and invincible. Nothing bad sticks to you — you glide through life.

name: Gasoline
description: Highly flammable and energetic. You power engines and drive progress — handle with care.

name: Diesel
description: Heavy, reliable, and long-burning. You keep going when others run out of steam.

name: Propane
description: Compact energy — you're portable and ready. A reliable source of heat when things get cold.

name: Butane
description: Light, volatile, and efficient. You ignite quickly and burn clean — no messing around.

name: Methane
description: Simple and potent. You're the building block of energy, small but mighty in impact.

name: Oxygen
description: Vital and life-giving. You're the breath in every lung — essential, untouchable, everywhere.

name: Hydrogen
description: The lightest of them all. You're everywhere in the universe — the beginning of everything.

name: Nitrogen
description: Calm, inert, and dependable. You make up most of the air but rarely get noticed.

name: Helium
description: Lighthearted and buoyant. You lift spirits and make voices squeak — impossible to be sad around.

name: Neon
description: Bright, flashy, and noble. You light up the night and catch everyone's eye.

name: Chlorine
description: Sharp and cleansing. You purify what's dirty but can be overwhelming in large doses.

name: Fluorine
description: The most reactive of all. You bond intensely and fiercely protect what's yours.

name: Gold
description: Precious, timeless, and untarnishable. You're rare and valuable — everyone wants you.

name: Silver
description: Lustrous and conductive. You reflect the truth and connect people beautifully.

name: Iron
description: Strong, foundational, and durable. You're the backbone of civilization — literally.

name: Copper
description: Warm, conductive, and versatile. You carry energy and develop a beautiful patina over time.

name: Aluminum
description: Light, strong, and endlessly recyclable. You adapt without losing your strength.

name: Lead
description: Dense, protective, and heavy. You shield others from harm but carry the weight yourself.

name: Mercury
description: Slippery, fluid, and unpredictable. You can't be pinned down — you flow your own way.

name: Tin
description: Modest but essential. You preserve what matters and rarely seek the spotlight.

name: Zinc
description: Galvanizing and protective. You coat others in strength and prevent them from rusting.

name: Platinum
description: Rare, catalytic, and noble. You accelerate reactions and make the impossible happen.

name: Uranium
description: Immense hidden power. You're calm until activated — then you change the world.

name: Calcium
description: Solid, strengthening, and foundational. You're the structure that holds everything together.

name: Sodium
description: Reactive and energetic. You burst into action and light up when the moment is right.

name: Potassium
description: Essential and reactive. You regulate what matters and keep the rhythm going.

name: Magnesium
description: Bright burning and calm. You burn brilliantly but find peace in stillness.

name: Silicon
description: The thinking element. You're the foundation of modern thought and digital connection.

name: Sulfur
description: Pungent and essential. You smell bad but you're vital — nature's necessary contradiction.

name: Phosphorus
description: Glowing and intense. You burn brightly and never go unnoticed in the dark.

name: Lithium
description: Light and stabilizing. You balance extremes and bring calm to chaos.

name: Arsenic
description: Poisonous yet historic. You're dangerous but fascinating — beautiful from a distance.

name: Bromine
description: Liquid and reactive. You're rare at room temperature — fluid and intense.

name: Iodine
description: Violet and vital. You're essential in tiny amounts and visually stunning.

name: Titanium
description: Strong, light, and futuristic. You're built for extremes and never corrode under pressure.

name: Chromium
description: Shiny and hard. You resist corrosion and make everything around you look better.

name: Nickel
description: Tough and versatile. You're in every alloy, making others stronger just by being around.

name: Cobalt
description: Deep blue and magnetic. You're rare, beautiful, and hold a charge long after others fade.

name: Citric Acid
description: Zesty and refreshing. You bring brightness and cut through the dullness of life.

name: Lactic Acid
description: The burn of effort. You appear when things get hard — the proof that you gave it your all.

name: Acetic Acid
description: Sharp and versatile. You cut through and preserve — a little sour but essential.

name: Sulfuric Acid
description: The king of chemicals. You're powerful, corrosive, and the most industrially vital of them all.

name: Hydrochloric Acid
description: Relentlessly reactive. You break down anything in your path — honest to a fault.

name: Nitric Acid
description: Oxidizing and intense. You're highly reactive and leave your mark everywhere you go.

name: Phosphoric Acid
description: Stabilizing and versatile. You keep things balanced and prevent corrosion in relationships.

name: Boric Acid
description: Mildly antiseptic and calm. You protect without being harsh — gentle but effective.

name: Lye
description: Caustic and cleansing. You're harsh but transformative — breaking down to build anew.

name: Soap
description: Cleansing and comforting. You wash away the dirt and leave everything fresh.

name: Glass
description: Transparent and fragile. You see through everything clearly but need careful handling.

name: Diamond
description: Brilliant and unbreakable. You're the hardest thing there is — pressure made perfection.

name: Graphite
description: Slippery and conductive. You glide through friction and leave your mark on everything.

name: Chalk
description: Soft and educational. You've been the tool of teachers for centuries — humble but essential.

name: Quartz
description: Crystalline and precise. You keep perfect time and resonate with clarity.

name: Clay
description: Malleable and creative. You can be shaped into anything — the original 3D printer.

name: Cement
description: Binding and foundational. You hold everything together and build things that last.

name: Concrete
description: Strong, enduring, and everywhere. You're the foundation of modern civilization itself.

name: Asphalt
description: Dark, smooth, and durable. You pave the way for journeys and keep things moving.

name: Rubber
description: Bouncy and elastic. You stretch without breaking and always return to your original shape.

name: Nylon
description: Smooth, strong, and synthetic. You're the perfect blend of flexibility and toughness.

name: Polyester
description: Wrinkle-resistant and reliable. You look good without trying and last forever.

name: Silicone
description: Flexible, heat-resistant, and smooth. You adapt to any temperature without losing yourself.

name: Plastic
description: Moldable and everywhere. You can become anything — the ultimate shape-shifter.

name: PVC
description: Tough and versatile. You're in pipes, cables, and clothing — an unsung hero of modern life.

name: Styrofoam
description: Light and insulating. You protect what's fragile and keep things at the right temperature.

name: Penicillin
description: The first miracle cure. You save lives quietly and changed medicine forever.

name: Ibuprofen
description: Reliable pain relief. You're there for headaches, fevers, and the everyday aches of life.

name: Paracetamol
description: Gentle but effective. You soothe fever and pain without the drama — mild yet trusted.

name: Morphine
description: The ultimate painkiller. You numb the deepest wounds but demand respect for your power.

name: Codeine
description: A gentler healer. You're there when the pain is real but not unbearable — a soft landing.

name: LSD
description: Mind-expanding and profound. You show people new dimensions and change perspectives forever.

name: Cocaine
description: Intense and short-lived. You give a rush like nothing else but leave just as fast.

name: Heroin
description: Powerfully seductive. You promise escape but demand everything in return.

name: Methamphetamine
description: Intensely stimulating. You supercharge everything — but the crash is just as real.

name: Adderall
description: Focus in a bottle. You sharpen the mind and make the impossible feel manageable.

name: Prozac
description: Bright and stabilizing. You lift the fog and help people find their smile again.

name: Xanax
description: Calming and soothing. You quiet the noise and make the world feel safer.

name: Valium
description: The original chill pill. You relax muscles and minds — the classic tension-tamer.

name: Viagra
description: Confidence and performance. You show up when it matters and deliver every time.

name: Amoxicillin
description: Broad-spectrum defense. You fight infections on all fronts — a trusted guardian.

name: Chlorophyll
description: Green and life-giving. You turn sunlight into energy — the ultimate sustainer.

name: Hemoglobin
description: The breath of life. You carry oxygen to every corner — essential and tireless.

name: Carotene
description: Bright orange and protective. You give color to life and shield against the sun.

name: Lycopene
description: Red and antioxidant. You protect from within and keep things from oxidizing.

name: Menthol
description: Cool and refreshing. You bring a chill vibe and clear the air wherever you go.

name: Cinnamon
description: Warm, spicy, and comforting. You're the familiar scent of home and holiday.

name: Vanillin
description: Sweet, warm, and universally loved. You're the world's favorite flavor.

name: Capsaicin
description: Hot and intense. You bring the heat and make everything more exciting.

name: Glue
description: Sticky and binding. You hold broken things together and never let go.

name: Paint
description: Colorful and transformative. You cover surfaces and make the world more beautiful.

name: Ink
description: Dark and expressive. You carry ideas from mind to paper — the voice of the written word.

name: Wax
description: Moldable and protective. You can be shaped, melted, and reformed — adaptable to any role.

name: Candle Wax
description: Warm and illuminating. You burn steadily and light up dark rooms with quiet grace.

name: Perfume
description: Fragrant and memorable. You leave a lasting impression wherever you go.

name: Deodorant
description: Fresh and protective. You keep things pleasant and prevent unpleasant situations.

name: Toothpaste
description: Clean and protective. You keep things bright and fight decay every single day.

name: Shampoo
description: Cleansing and refreshing. You wash away the old and leave everything feeling new.

name: Conditioner
description: Smoothing and repairing. You untangle knots and leave everything silky soft.

name: Lotion
description: Hydrating and soothing. You moisturize dry patches and make everything feel cared for.

name: Sunscreen
description: Protective and shielding. You block harmful rays and keep things safe in the sun.

name: Lipstick
description: Bold and expressive. You add color to conversations and confidence to smiles.

name: Nail Polish
description: Glossy and perfect. You add the finishing touch and make everything look polished.

name: Detergent
description: Deep cleaning and powerful. You tackle tough stains and leave nothing but freshness.

name: Disinfectant
description: Sterilizing and protective. You kill germs and make the world a safer place.

name: Pesticide
description: Controversially effective. You eliminate pests but carry the weight of unintended consequences.

name: Herbicide
description: Selective and thorough. You remove what doesn't belong and give room for growth.

name: Fertilizer
description: Nourishing and productive. You help things grow and make barren soil bloom.

name: Gunpowder
description: Combustible and historic. You changed warfare and opened the door to the modern age.

name: Fireworks
description: Explosive and beautiful. You light up the sky and make every celebration unforgettable.

name: Smoke
description: Mysterious and atmospheric. You signal from afar and linger long after the fire is gone.
